title: The Harvest Men - 7 Day Immersion Sample
objective: Demonstrate full daily flow with narrative progression, clues, interactions, puzzle cadence, and immersion-aware personalization.

narrativeProgression.summary: An intake anomaly lands across multiple channels before dawn.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Players receive synchronized SMS photos of the same ritual mask in three different houses.

threadUpdates.update: Dusk Selection: Players receive synchronized SMS photos of the same ritual mask in three different houses.
Peripheral signal tied to Blood-soil composition panel remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: The Harvest Men - Day 01 police report
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Blood-soil composition panel.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: The Harvest Men ARG artifact Day 01. Type: police_report. Clue focus: Blood-soil composition panel. Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: The Harvest Men police_report audio cue for day 1. Clue anchor: Blood-soil composition panel. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Blood-soil composition panel and tell me if your last call still stands (none).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Blood-soil composition panel.

distraction.title: Red Herring 01
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Blood-soil composition panel with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

puzzle.title: Day 02 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Festival lantern route map.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with FEST.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.
